}

{{ currentImageIndex() + 1 }} / {{ variantModel()!.productImages.length }}

}
} @else {
No Images Added for this Variant
}

Variant Information

#{{ variantModel()!.productVariantId }}

Product Name {{ variantModel()!.productName }}
SKU {{ variantModel()!.sku }}
Category {{ variantModel()!.productCategoryName }}
Sub Category {{ variantModel()!.productSubCategoryName }}
Main Attribute {{ variantModel()!.mainProductSubCategoryAttributeName }}
Price ₹{{ variantModel()!.price | number }}
Added By {{ variantModel()!.addedByVendorUser }}
Created Date {{ variantModel()!.createdAt | date:'dd/MM/yyyy' }}
Description

{{ variantModel()!.description }}

Variant Status

{{ variantModel()!.productVariantStatus }}

Approval Status

{{ variantModel()!.productVariantApprovalStatus }}

{{ variantModel()!.availableQuantity }}

Min Qty / User

{{ variantModel()!.minimuQuantityPerUser }}

Weight (Kg)

{{ variantModel()!.weightInKgs }}

Dimensions (cm)
Length {{ variantModel()!.lengthInCm }}
Width {{ variantModel()!.widthInCm }}
Height {{ variantModel()!.heightInCm }}
Policies
Return {{ variantModel()!.isReturn ? 'Allowed' : 'Not Allowed' }}
Exchange {{ variantModel()!.isExchange ? 'Allowed' : 'Not Allowed' }}

Variant Attributes

@if (variantModel()?.attributes) { @for (attr of variantModel()!.attributes; track attr.productVariantAttributeId) { } @empty { } }
Attribute Name Attribute Value

} @if (isImagePopupOpen()) {
